hero.title: The art of naturalness
hero.subtitle: Where science meets gentleness — every smile is a natural work of art

about.title: Who takes care of you
about.description: Dr. Milena Grossi Germiniani carries on a family tradition in dentistry that began with her father, Dr. Ademir Grossi. With dual specialization in Facial Harmonization and Orthodontics, she combines cutting-edge science with artistic sensibility to reveal the best version of every smile.
about.legacy: A family tradition in dentistry — from father's practice to daughter's leadership, three decades of caring for smiles in Ouro Fino.
about.locations: Ouro Fino, MG and São Paulo, SP (Itaim Bibi)

treatmentsHof.title: The art of natural
treatmentsHof.subtitle: Procedures that enhance your beauty without losing the essence of who you are

toxina.name: Botulinum Toxin
toxina.description: Softens expression lines with natural and subtle results. Precise application for a rested and harmonious face.

preenchimento.name: Facial and Lip Fillers
preenchimento.description: Restores volumes and contours with high-quality hyaluronic acid. Lips, jawline, cheekbones — each area treated with anatomical precision.

skinbooster.name: Skinbooster
skinbooster.description: Deep skin hydration with injectable hyaluronic acid. Improves texture, luminosity and vitality from within.

hipro.name: HIPRO Day
hipro.description: Advanced facial rejuvenation protocol with high-intensity microfocused ultrasound. Progressive and long-lasting results.

ultrassom.name: Microfocused Ultrasound
ultrassom.description: Stimulates collagen in deep skin layers without surgery. Firmness and support with cutting-edge technology.

bioestimuladores.name: Collagen Biostimulators
bioestimuladores.description: Stimulate the body's natural collagen production. Gradual rejuvenation with an increasingly natural appearance.

bioreconexao.name: BIOreCONNECTION Protocol
bioreconexao.description: Exclusive protocol developed by Dr. Milena that integrates different harmonization techniques for synergistic and personalized results.

cirurgia.name: Facial Harmonization Surgery
cirurgia.description: Minimally invasive surgical procedures in facial harmonization. For cases requiring intervention beyond injectable treatments.

treatmentsHof.cta: Discover which treatment is right for you

transition.phrase: Your smile deserves science and gentleness

treatmentsOdonto.title: The science of smiles
treatmentsOdonto.subtitle: Excellence in orthodontics and dentistry with technology and humanized care

ortodontia.name: Orthodontics
ortodontia.description: Dental alignment with digital planning and state-of-the-art braces. Every case is unique — every treatment is too.

ortopedia.name: Functional Jaw Orthopedics
ortopedia.description: Treatment that guides facial bone growth in children and adolescents, preventing future problems.

invisalign.name: Invisalign
invisalign.description: Clear aligners that straighten your smile with discretion and comfort. 3D planning with final result preview.

invisalignFirst.name: Invisalign First
invisalignFirst.description: Invisalign version specially designed for children from age 6. Early treatment with gentle technology.

clareamento.name: Teeth Whitening
clareamento.description: Whiter teeth with safety and no sensitivity. Personalized protocols for natural and lasting results.

odontopediatria.name: Pediatric Dentistry
odontopediatria.description: Welcoming and playful children's care. Each visit is a positive experience building a healthy relationship with the dentist.

bruxismo.name: Bruxism and TMJ
bruxismo.description: Diagnosis and treatment of bruxism and temporomandibular disorders. Pain relief and teeth protection.

megatriagem.name: Comprehensive Screening
megatriagem.description: Complete and detailed oral health assessment. Integrated diagnosis considering face, smile and function.

kids.title: Little smiles, big care
kids.subtitle: A welcoming space where every child feels safe to smile
kids.description: Dr. Milena believes the relationship with the dentist begins in childhood. With playful and gentle care, each visit is designed to make little ones feel welcome — building trust that lasts a lifetime.
kids.invisalignFirst: Invisalign First — invisible orthodontics from age 6
kids.odontopediatria: Pediatric dentistry with a welcoming and playful approach

dualSpecialty.title: Dual specialty
dualSpecialty.description: Facial Harmonization + Orthodontics: integrated vision of face and smile

invisalignDoctor.title: Invisalign Doctor
invisalignDoctor.description: Official certification for cutting-edge invisible aligners

twoLocations.title: Ouro Fino and São Paulo
twoLocations.description: Care in Ouro Fino (OUROClin) and São Paulo (Itaim Bibi)

familyLegacy.title: Family legacy
familyLegacy.description: Dental tradition inherited from her father, Dr. Ademir Grossi

exclusiveProtocol.title: BIOreCONNECTION Protocol
exclusiveProtocol.description: Exclusive method integrating techniques for synergistic results

naturalApproach.title: Natural approach
naturalApproach.description: Results that enhance your beauty without excess — the art of naturalness

location.title: Find Dr. Milena
location.spNote: Also available in São Paulo — Itaim Bibi

contact.title: Begin your transformation
contact.subtitle: Schedule your evaluation and discover how science and gentleness can transform your smile
